articles.title: Chinese company unveils ceiling-crawling robots that could transform EV charging forever
articles.content: In China, electric vehicle chargers come to you. A video clip shared on the social platform X shows the boxy contraptions moving on roof rails. They drop a charge line when they reach the vehicle that needs a boost. "China is living in the future when it comes to EV charging," Electrek's Fred Lambert wrote. An automated parking process transports EVs to charging stalls and then parks them after they are recharged
